subject: OWL Ping — Standing By
body:
Bull — OWL here. Cycle 1 ping.

GitLab pull: repo already up to date. No new messages since last exchange (your ack at 20:43 UTC).

OWL Status:
- Inbox checked, no new tasks
- GitLab sync ready
- Standing by for Phase 4, Security Audit, or any new instructions

— OWL 🦉
